title: Mid-QC & Fix-Waves Meta Tracking (P-mid)
completion_report: P-mid: 3-wave evidence gate complete. 12 QC reports all Approve. 33/35 V1.57+/V1.58+ residuals closed + DF-44 fully closed. Mid-QA Pass with notes (1 non-blocking test expectation drift for P-last hygiene). Wave 1 + Wave 3 had fix-waves; Wave 2 clean first-pass.
